results.title: Chennai Super Kings' Struggles in IPL 2026: MS Dhoni's Future Uncertain
results.description: The Chennai Super Kings had a disappointing IPL 2026 season, failing to qualify for the playoffs. With MS Dhoni sidelined due to injuries, speculation about his future with the team continues. As discussions about potential coaching changes arise, the team faces a tight playoff race among other franchises. Discover the latest updates on CSK's performance and Dhoni's uncertain role moving forward.

results.title: “He says what he thinks” – Liverpool star defends Salah after apparent dig at Slot
results.description: Liverpool star Florian Wirtz has defended Mohamed Salah amid what appears to be ongoing friction between the Reds forward and manager Arne Slot. Salah recently attracted headlines for a post on his social media about Liverpool needing to return to playing ‘heavy metal football’, which is something associated with former manager Jurgen Klopp. DOWNLOAD THE [...] The post “He says what he thinks” – Liverpool star defends Salah after apparent dig at Slot appeared first on CaughtOffside .

results.title: Commonwealth Games 2030: Key venues such as SVP complex set for completion by 2029
results.description: Ahmedabad's sports complexes for the 2030 Commonwealth Games are nearing completion. Key venues like the Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Sports Enclave and Gujarat Police Academy are on schedule. India plans to include sports like shooting, badminton, and hockey. Celebrations for Commonwealth Games Day are underway, highlighting India's sporting journey and future aspirations.
